tracks.rawText: 1:55Lalo Rubio - RATO SUploadBoom bap hip hop, A melancholic piano loop plays a minor key progression with a slight vinyl crackle effect, The drum kit features a punchy, dry kick on beats 1 and 3, with a crisp, layered snare on 2 and 4, A steady 16th-note closed hi-hat pattern provides rhythmic drive, A deep, sub-heavy synth bass follows the piano's root notes, Male vocals are delivered in a rapid-fire, rhythmic Spanish rap style with a dry, upfront mix, The tempo is 92 BPM in the key of C minor2PublishRemix
tracks.title: Lalo Rubio - RATO S

tracks.rawText: 2:38Untitled Projectv5.5CoverPowerful salsa fest at 180 BPM with 2-3 son clave, montuno piano guajeo, baby bass tumbao, congas on martillo, timbales on cascara with rimshots and fills, cowbell quarter-note pulse, and woodblock accents, Brass section hits staccato stabs, then melodic unison lines; lead phrasing is rhythmic and speech-like, almost spoken, people singingPublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 2:20Untitled Projectv5.5CoverExplosive salsa-fest worldwide sound with 2-3 son clave, cowbell quarter-note pulse, congas and timbales locked in martillo and cascara, and baby bass tumbao driving the floor, Montuno piano guajeo evolves into dense chordal variations while brass cuts in with staccato stabs, then melodic unison lines, all bright, punchy, and dance-floor tightPublishRemix
tracks.title: Untitled Project
